About description: Review runtime details and the packaged desktop stack.
App subtitle: Desktop analytics for structured production data.
Browse files description: Supports .xlsx and .xls, one file at a time, up to {{size}} MB.
Community description: Use this space for operator notes, process learnings, and rollout updates across teams.
Drop to analyze description: Release the workbook to generate a quick signal preview.
Drop your workbook here description: Drag an Excel workbook into the dock or browse directly from disk.
Forums description: Keep cross-functional reviews organized with discussion threads for each release train.
General description: Tune the desktop experience for language and appearance before you process new data.
Language description: Choose the interface language used throughout the workspace.
No chartable data description: The workbook loaded successfully, but no numeric columns were detected for plotting.
Operations deck description: Inspect uploads, compare signals, and keep every analysis local to the desktop runtime.
Preview idle description: Upload a workbook to inspect detected columns and build a quick trend view.
Sections description: Search and switch between configuration areas.
Settings description: Fine-tune language, appearance, and runtime details for this workstation.
Signal trend overview description: Compare simulated production signals across the latest shift window.
Series preview description: Numeric columns are detected automatically and rendered as a quick multi-line chart.
Spreadsheet size error: The workbook is too large. Please keep it under {{size}} MB.
Support description: Collect runbooks, escalation paths, and field support updates in a single surface.
Theme description: Select how the interface should adapt to ambient light and system preferences.
Version information description: Runtime versions exposed from the Electron preload bridge.
Workbook empty error: No worksheets were found in this workbook.
Workbook read error: Unable to read the workbook. Please verify the file and try again.
